mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tpl_template_version WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tpl_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC

SELECT id, template_id, version, change_log, published, publish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM tpl_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT * FROM tpl_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_template_version (template_id, version, template_json, change_log, published, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{version}, #{templateJson}, #{changeLog}, #{published}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_template_version
template_json = #{templateJson}, change_log = #{changeLog}, published = #{published}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_template_version SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
